_comment: IMF Government Finance Statistics importer configuration. The IMF SDMX JSON API is publicly accessible. Indicator codes reference the GFS dataset.

source._comment: IMF SDMX JSON REST API base URL.

indicators._comment: Map from internal field name to IMF GFS indicator code. These represent tax revenue components as % of GDP.

output._comment: Path to write the enrichment JSON cache file, relative to this config file.
